turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, I wanted to find out if Dr. Vikram Rao is available this Saturday. He's a cardiologist I think.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Let me check that for you. Could you also share whether this is for a follow-up or a new consultation?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: It's a follow-up. He did my angioplasty last year.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I see. I'm sorry, but specific doctor scheduling details, especially for post-procedure follow-ups with senior specialists, are something I'm not able to confirm accurately from this line. I wouldn't want to give you incorrect information. Let me connect you to our staff who have direct access to Dr. Vikram Rao's schedule.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Of course. Please hold and I'll connect you to our staff right away.
